label: Lights & Lighting

seo.title: Crystal Chandeliers & Villa Lighting for Ghana Projects
seo.description: Long crystal staircase chandeliers, hall main lights, and dining feature lights for high-ceiling Accra villa interiors.

hero.lead: Five crystal chandeliers — engineered for villa stairwells, double-height halls, and dining feature ceilings. From a 5-tier 40×80 cm crystal to a long-drop staircase piece.

items.title: Sized for villa ceiling heights
items.body: All five selected for 3.0–6.0 m ceiling drops, common in Accra villa stairwells.

items.title: 220V Ghana spec
items.body: All wiring and fittings spec'd for Ghana 220V/50Hz mains, no transformer needed.

items.title: Installation included on quote
items.body: Every lighting order quotes installation by Decoropic's Accra electrical partners.

applications: Villa staircase / double-height entrance — CYM007 long-drop piece suspended from the upper floor, visible from both levels.
Main living room — CMY011 and CYM033 as the primary overhead anchor, layered with floor lamps.
Dining feature — CYM032 linear and CYM039 5-tier positioned over a round or rectangular dining table.

faq.question: What lighting do you supply for villas and hotels in Ghana?
faq.answer: We supply crystal chandeliers for stairwells, halls, and dining features; ambient ceiling lights; and outdoor feature lighting — all specified at 220–230V for Ghana's mains supply and selected for performance in tropical humidity conditions.

faq.question: Are your chandeliers compatible with Ghana's 220V power supply?
faq.answer: Yes — all lighting is specified and tested at 220–230V / 50 Hz, which matches Ghana's mains standard. We advise on surge protection given the voltage fluctuation common on the Accra grid, and all wiring is certified for export.

faq.question: How do crystal chandeliers arrive undamaged to Accra?
faq.answer: Each chandelier is factory-packed per piece in foam-lined crating with impact indicators. Decoropic handles export documentation, Tema port customs clearance, and last-mile delivery to your project site as standard.
